name: Readymade Security Cabin
description:
Most security cabins in this market are built when ordered — you specify size, panel material, colour, and electrical, then wait two or three weeks for the factory to start. SAMAN's readymade security cabin is the other route. The 8'×6'×8' stock SKU is already built, sitting at our Bangalore yard in one of eight factory-painted colours, ready to load onto a truck inside the working week. ₹95,000. No specification decisions. No factory queue. No surprises.

What is a Readymade Security Cabin?

A readymade security cabin is a guard post built to a standard factory specification, kept in stock at the manufacturer's yard, and dispatched without any specification decisions from the buyer. SAMAN's stock SKU is an 8'×6'×8' steel-and-wood cabin in eight factory-painted colours, available from our Bangalore yard at ₹95,000 with 3-day dispatch within 200 km.

Stock units of the 8'×6'×8' SKU lined up on the Gopasandra yard floor — the brown, dark grey, olive green, blue, and red variants all available for immediate same-week dispatch within a 200 km radius.

The Standard Configuration in the ₹95,000 Stock SKU

Every unit at the Bangalore yard is built to the same specification. Footprint 8 feet by 6 feet, ceiling height 8 feet — usable interior floor area roughly 48 sq ft (4.5 sq m). SKU code SP-CC-40-2024.

The structural frame is a mild-steel perimeter base with vertical MS corner posts. Wall infill is wood panel, factory-painted with industrial-grade exterior coating. The roof is an MS frame skinned with corrugated GI sheet, set at a 3-degree rear-shed slope so monsoon water sheds clear. The floor is cement fiber board on the MS sub-frame.

Fittings ship as standard: one steel hinged door with internal latch, one sliding observation window for the guard, and an electrical fit-out of one ceiling light point, one fan point, and one 5A/15A wall socket — wired to a small MCB panel ready for direct mains connection at site.

This is the build you receive. No frame thickness upgrades. No PUF insulation. No additional windows.

The 8 Stock Colours Available Without a Wait

Eight factory-painted finishes ship from the yard with the cabin already coated and cured: brown, black, green, blue, orange, red, dark grey, and olive green.

Choice typically tracks the gate. Brown suits apartment compounds and corporate-office gates where the cabin should blend with existing security architecture. Dark grey, black, and olive green hide dust and exhaust soiling at factory and industrial entrances. Blue works at school and institutional gates. Orange and red are picked by security firms maintaining brand consistency across client sites, and by event venues where visibility from a distance matters.

Custom colour matching against a specific RAL code or paint sample is possible — but it takes the unit out of stock dispatch and adds 5 to 7 working days, which defeats the purpose. For a single cabin, the eight stock colours preserve the same-week dispatch window.

How the eight stock colours typically pair with gate type — brown for corporate compounds, black for factory entrances, blue for institutional gates, olive green for logistics yards.

How Fast Does It Leave the Yard?

Our Bangalore yard at Gopasandra dispatches South India. Within 200 km, 3 working days from order confirmation. Broader South India — Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, southern Andhra Pradesh — typically lands at 5 to 7 working days.

North, West, and East India dispatch from our Greater Noida yard at Jalpura. Lead time runs 7 to 21 working days from order confirmation, depending on distance and transporter routing.

Before the invoice is raised, yard staff physically confirm the requested colour is in stock. If it isn't, we shift to a colour that is, or apply fresh paint and extend dispatch by 5 to 7 days — your call.

tock dispatch from the Gopasandra yard — a finished 8'×6' readymade cabin loaded onto a flatbed for delivery within the three-working-day Bangalore radius.

What ₹95,000 Includes — and What's a Separate Line Item

The ₹95,000 sale price (MRP ₹1,05,000) covers the standard cabin and standard delivery within the Bangalore radius. Anything that requires a factory modification or a site-specific add-on is invoiced as a separate line item.

Included in ₹95,000 Separate line item
8'×6'×8' steel & wood cabin CCTV camera mount + conduit
One of 8 factory-painted colours AC sleeve cutout (factory pre-fit only)
Steel hinged door with internal latch Internal partition for locker space
One sliding observation window Custom paint outside the 8 stock colours
Standard electrical: 1 light + 1 fan + 1 socket Anchor-bolt fixing to a concrete plinth
Delivery within 200 km of Bangalore Transport beyond the 200 km radius
Setup on a prepared pad + mains connection GST charged on the invoice line

Each add-on is confirmed at the order stage before fabrication or dispatch. No surprise charges after the truck leaves the yard.

What You Can't Change About a Ready-Stock Unit

Five things are locked on a stock unit. The cabin is already built — these aren't decisions still on the table.

Size is fixed at 8'×6'×8'. The build is fixed: MS frame, wood-panel infill, MS-and-GI roof, cement-fiber-board floor. Colour is one of the eight on the yard. Electrical is one light, one fan point, one 5A/15A socket. There's no internal partition — the floor is one open space.

If any of these need to change, that's a different SKU. The SAMAN spec-build option uses the same controlled factory build process, but you supply the variables and the unit is built to your specification rather than pulled from stock.

Inside the stock SKU — a single open 48 sq ft room with the standard one-light-one-fan-one-socket electrical fitout. No internal partition. This is the build buyers receive; it cannot be reconfigured on the readymade unit.

When to Pick Readymade vs the Standard Security Guard Cabin

SAMAN's security cabin range has a standard 6×6×9 SKU at ₹75,000 and this readymade 8'×6'×8' SKU at ₹95,000. Both use the same MS-frame-plus-wood-panel build standard. The differentiators are size and decision-making.

Pick this readymade unit when you want a larger interior — 48 sq ft of floor rather than 36 sq ft — and you don't want to make specification choices. Stock dispatch in 3 working days matters more to you than the ₹20,000 price gap.

Pick the standard 6×6×9 security guard cabin when 36 sq ft fits your guard comfortably, when ₹20,000 saved matters more than the size upgrade, or when you want to specify accessories (CCTV bracket, AC sleeve, internal partition) before fabrication rather than buy them as add-on line items afterwards.

For relocation between gates or for a factory-built-to-spec batch, those are different SKUs in the full security cabin range.

The size differentiator in the SAMAN security cabin range — readymade is wider (8'×6'), the standard guard cabin is taller (6'×6'×9'). Same MS-frame and wood-panel build standard across both.

Frequently Asked About Pre-Built Stock Units

How is "readymade" different from "prefabricated" in the SAMAN security cabin range?

Readymade means a unit already built and sitting in our yard — one specification, eight colours, no decisions for the buyer to make. Prefabricated means a unit built to your specification using the same factory-controlled process — you choose the variables, we build to order. Readymade ships faster; prefabricated fits a specific brief.

Is the 8'×6' readymade unit the same build as the 6×6×9 security guard cabin standard model?

Same MS-frame-plus-wood-panel build standard. Different footprint and ceiling height. The readymade unit is 8'×6'×8' for buyers who want more interior space and prefer the stock dispatch route. The standard 6×6×9 sibling is the entry-tier SKU at ₹75,000 with selectable accessories. Build quality is identical across both.

If I need 5 identical readymade cabins, can SAMAN dispatch all from stock?

We typically hold 3 to 6 units of each standard colour in our Bangalore yard at any time. For 5 identical cabins in the same colour, call before placing the order. If stock isn't matched, we ship 2 to 3 from stock immediately and produce the balance in 7 working days, then dispatch the batch together.

Can I visit the Bangalore yard to see the stock unit before placing the order?

Yes. Our Gopasandra yard is open to buyer visits during weekday working hours. Call one working day ahead so the team can confirm the colour you're considering is physically on the floor when you arrive. Yard visits are most common for security firms placing multi-cabin orders for client sites; most single-cabin buyers skip the visit and confirm over WhatsApp.

Get Your Stock Unit on the Truck This Week

Confirm your colour preference and delivery PIN code, and we'll come back within working hours with stock confirmation and a dispatch date. Calls and WhatsApp on +91 97089 89937. Or send the same details through the enquiry form on this page.
short_description:
8’×6’×8′ ready stock — dispatched same week from our Bangalore yard.
Pre-built guard cabin with MS frame, wood-panel walls, and 8 factory-painted colour finishes. No specification decisions, no factory queue. Same build standard as our entry guard cabin — larger footprint, ready-stock dispatch.
Size / Capacity 8’×6’×8′ / 1 guard
Frame / Panel MS frame / wood panel
Price / Delivery ₹95,000 / 3-day BLR
FloorLoad / Relocations Cement board / Fixed
SKU SP-CC-40-2024
From ₹95,000
